generated_exposure.exposure_text: I get why people worry about alliance commitments, but let's be real - our partners aren't pulling their weight. Remember when Germany delayed their defense spending increases? Meanwhile, our local emergency services are stretched thin. We need to focus on securing OUR borders first. #NationalSecurityFirst #AllianceRealityCheck
